common.explore_subtitle: Browse our database of scientifically verified ingredient swaps.
common.feature_1_desc: We analyze the pH, moisture, and fat content to ensure your bake never fails.
common.feature_2_desc: Specialized in K-Food and international ingredients for local supermarkets.
common.feature_3_desc: Every ratio is double-checked by our AI and verified by real chefs.
common.footer_tagline: Making international cooking accessible to everyone.
common.disclaimer: * Disclaimer: Cooking results may vary. Always check for allergen information before swapping ingredients.

swap.hero_description: The most accurate ingredient substitute database with chemical ratios and flavor correction guides. Scientifically proven, chef-verified.
swap.hack_it_title: Don't just swap it. Add a 'Chef's Kick'.
swap.hack_it_desc: Beyond simple ratios, here is the professional guide to elevate your dish.
